name: Deploy crypto screener picks to a Gainium DCA bot with Telegram approval

parameters.content:
## Deploy crypto screener picks to a Gainium DCA bot with Telegram approval

### How it works

This workflow runs each morning, reads configuration for a Gainium DCA bot, and fetches the top crypto screener results. It converts the screener output into a top-N pair list, sends the proposal to a trader on Telegram, and only updates and starts the bot if the trader approves. Deployment activity is logged to Google Sheets, while skipped runs and screener or workflow failures are reported through Telegram.

### Setup steps

- Configure the schedule trigger for the desired run time and timezone.
- Add Gainium credentials and verify the configured bot_id, bot_type, top_n, and paper_trading values in the Config node.
- Configure Telegram credentials, target chat IDs, and the approval message/response format used by the approval IF condition.
- Connect Google Sheets credentials and select the spreadsheet/sheet used to log deployments.
- Ensure the global error workflow is enabled in n8n so workflow-level failures trigger the Telegram error alert.

### Customization

Adjust top_n, paper_trading mode, screener criteria, approval wording, and the Google Sheets log columns to match the trading strategy and audit requirements.

## Schedule and screen pairs

Starts the daily run, sets Gainium bot parameters, retrieves screener results, and formats the top-N trading pairs for review.

## Request trader approval

Sends the proposed pair list to Telegram and routes execution based on whether the trader approves the deployment.

## Deploy approved bot

For approved proposals, replaces the bot pair list, starts the Gainium bot, records the deployment in Google Sheets, and confirms deployment in Telegram.

## Notify skipped deployment

Handles the rejection path by notifying the trader that the proposed bot update was skipped.

## Failure alert handling

Contains the lower alert cluster for screener-specific failures and global workflow errors, both reported to Telegram.

parameters.text:
=⏭️ *Skipped today*

No changes made to *{{ $('Set Bot Configuration').item.json.bot_id }}*.
Proposed pairs were: `{{ $('Build Top Pairs String').item.json.pairs }}`
*Time:* {{ $now.format('MMM d, yyyy HH:mm') }}
